headline: Boeing (BA) Could Be 13% Undervalued As 737 MAX Output Ramps Up
summary: Boeing (BA) has drawn fresh attention after starting a fourth 737 MAX assembly line at its Everett facility, following second quarter deliveries that exceeded expectations and a Fitch credit outlook upgrade. See our latest analysis for Boeing. The recent production ramp has coincided with stronger share price momentum for Boeing, with a 7-day share price return of 9.25% and a 90-day share price return of 11.69%. The 1-year total shareholder return of 7.28% sits against a modest 5-year total...

headline: Memory chip stocks fall into a bull market amid latest tech sell-off
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the memory chip trade — particularly the intraday performances of Micron Technology (MU), SK Hynix (000660.KS), and Samsung (005930.KS) — as these three big names have seemingly dragged the sector into a bear market.

headline: Lockheed Martin Vs. Boeing: Which Stocks Is A Better Buy In July
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) and Boeing (NYSE: BA) both posted Q1 2026 results that read like two different industries. Lockheed runs a pure defense execution engine with messy program charges but reaffirmed guidance. Boeing claws back from manufacturing, certification, and legal scars while its commercial unit loses money on every plane it ships. Program Charges ... Lockheed Martin Vs. headline: Boeing (BA) Hit By IT Outage That Disrupted Commercial And Defense Production
summary: Boeing reported a significant unplanned IT outage affecting both commercial and defense production lines. The disruption temporarily impacted manufacturing and delivery workflows across key programs. The company identified the cause and stated the incident is not believed to be related to a cyberattack. Boeing, listed as NYSE:BA, is coming into this outage after a period of positive share price performance, with the stock up 9.2% over the past week and 8.9% over the past month, and trading...

headline: Boeing (BA) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company Boeing (NYSE:BA) jumped 3.6% in the afternoon session after the company started operating a fourth assembly line for its popular 737 MAX jetliner as reports indicated strong delivery numbers for June.
